io.minio.HeadObjectBaseArgs
Direct Known Subclasses:
HeadObjectArgs, StatObjectArgs
public abstract class HeadObjectBaseArgs extends ObjectConditionalReadArgs
Common arguments of HeadObjectArgs and StatObjectArgs.
